raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation to self-knowledge and timely inner regulation via cosmic perspective and mortality reminder",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a person is both part of and derivative from a governed cosmos",
    "human time is finite and non-repeating",
    "the soul is subject to curable 'distempers'",
    "failure to address those distempers within allotted time results in permanent loss"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as Stoic memento-mori rhetoric; metaphors of channel/spring and allotted time reinforce urgency without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recipient accepts figurative cosmic language as prompt for reflection and is motivated by finitude to pursue equanimity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "recipient treats the governor/channel imagery as literal theology or interprets the time limit fatalistically rather than as call to present agency"
}
